- @brief Base class with stored, computed, and observed properties.
- @brief Species name identifier.
```
16: class Animal {
18: var species: String
21: var legs: Int = 4 {
22: willSet {
24: print("Legs changing from \(legs) to \(newValue)")
25: }
26: didSet {
28: if legs < 0 { legs = 0 }
29: }
30: }

35: }

40: self.species = species
41: }
44: func speak() {
45: print("...")
46: }
50: class func createDefault() -> Animal {
51: return Animal(species: "Unknown")
52: }
55: deinit {

57: }
58: }
```

```
107: struct Matrix {
```

- @brief Failure carrying an error description.
```
162: enum AppResult<T> {

171: func map<U>(_ transform: (T) -> U) -> AppResult<U> {
172: switch self {

177: }
178: }
```

### STRUCT: `Clamped`
> Signature: `struct Clamped<Value: Comparable>`
> Lines: 247-268
- @brief Minimum allowed value.
- @brief Maximum allowed value.
```
247: struct Clamped<Value: Comparable> {
249: let min: Value
251: let max: Value
253: private var value: Value
256: var wrappedValue: Value {
257: get { return value }
258: set { value = Swift.min(Swift.max(newValue, min), max) }
259: }
262: init(wrappedValue: Value, min: Value, max: Value) {
263: self.min = min
264: self.max = max
266: self.value = Swift.min(Swift.max(wrappedValue, min), max)
267: }
268: }
```
